name: editMessageChecklist
description: Use this method to edit a checklist on behalf of a connected business account. On success, the edited Message

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the message will be sent

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot in the format @username

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target message

parameters.name: checklist
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object for the new checklist

parameters.name: reply_markup
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object for the new inline keyboard for the message
